title: 15 Puzzle
description: Slide the tiles into order, 1 through 15. Beat your best time.
author: Timepass

description: Slide the tiles, merge matching numbers, and chase the elusive 2048 tile.
author: Timepass

title: Aim Trainer
description: Pop 30 targets as fast as you can. Tracks your average time per target and accuracy.
author: Timepass

title: Mental Math Sprint
description: Solve as many arithmetic problems as you can in 60 seconds. Fast fingers, faster head.
author: Timepass

title: Number Memory
description: A number flashes for a moment — memorize it, then type it back. It gets one digit longer every round.
author: Timepass

title: Reaction Test
description: Wait for green, then tap as fast as you can. Tracks your reaction time and records.
author: Timepass

title: Snake
description: Eat, grow, and don't bite your tail. The classic — one more run never hurts.
author: Timepass

title: Word Guess
description: Guess the hidden five-letter word in six tries. Green is right spot, yellow is wrong spot.
author: Timepass
